element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental mechanic for creating buildable land and routing followers
Population growth engine; larger flat areas enable larger houses
Resource gate for unlocking divine powers; builds as followers construct
Victory condition: eliminate enemy population while growing own
Area denial and follower disruption; landscape manipulation
Terrain transformation; creates impassable or restrictive zones
High-impact offensive power; permanent terrain alteration
Convert followers to combat units; enables direct military advantage

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Progressive across levels (desert, rock, lava, snow, ice, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Aesthetic and mechanical; affects follower development rates and behavior

typical_relief_triggers: Leveling up and unlocking new divine powers
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating progression: early levels teach core mechanics with minimal opposition; mid-game introduces tactical power choices as mana unlocks advance; late-game forces final military engagement between balanced populations. Extended play sessions possible with lengthy individual level duration.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-focused; players learn terrain manipulation and follower management with minimal enemy pressure. Landscape diversity introduces variation but not challenge.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mana-gated power progression creates strategic depth. Players must balance offensive power usage (earthquakes, floods, swamps) against follower population growth. Enemy opposition intensifies.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Powers unlock (volcanoes, knight conversion) that enable direct military dominance. Player must manage resource scarcity and endgame battle conditions.
notable_spikes: Each mana threshold unlock changes available strategy options
Introduction of each new landscape biome type requires tactical adaptation
Final battle sequence (forced endgame conflict) when population imbalance triggers resolution

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level features a different terrain biome (desert, rock/lava, snow/ice, etc.). Landscape type affects follower development speed and building patterns, forcing players to adapt their terrain manipulation strategy.

Divine powers unlock based on accumulated mana threshold. As population builds, mana increases, unlocking new abilities. Creates escalating complexity and tactical options across 500-level progression.
Victory condition is population-relative: player must grow followers faster than enemy or eliminate enemy population entirely. Encourages both expansion and targeted disruption.

Open-book world map displayed in isometric perspective with command icons and mana slider visible. Consistent HUD layout across all 500 levels provides spatial consistency and clear resource feedback.
